title: Include Pattern
documentation:
## Purpose

Include Pattern specifies items that should be explicitly admitted into a collection or processing pipeline. When present, only items matching the pattern are forwarded; all others are dropped.

## When to use

Use this media type when a node supports allow-list filtering. Pair it with [Exclude Pattern](https://capdag.com/browse/media:exclude-pattern;textable) and [Filter Pattern](https://capdag.com/browse/media:filter-pattern;textable) to build layered selection logic.

## Notes

If no include pattern is provided, the node typically defaults to admitting all items. The pattern syntax is node-specific; consult the node's documentation to determine whether glob, regex, or literal matching is used.
